context: Verify that the agent runs the batch script correctly, reads the failure summary, and provides accurate remediation steps for failed files.

checklist.name: failed files identified from batch summary
checklist.description: The agent reads the batch summary output and correctly identifies paper3.pdf and paper5.pdf as failed files.

checklist.name: individual re-run command provided with --print flag
checklist.description: The agent provides the exact command to re-run one failed file individually, including --print for inspection, e.g. ./scripts/extractor.py ./literature/paper3.pdf --template review -o /tmp/paper3_debug.md --print.

checklist.name: user advised not to treat partial batch as complete
checklist.description: The agent explicitly warns that the output folder contains only 3 successful extractions and that the dataset is incomplete until failed files are resolved.
